name: RealBrowser by Ceki
author: iWedmak
description: Real Chrome sessions for AI agents — for tasks on sites you own or have authorization to operate on. Three modes: Self (your own Chrome), Marketplace (rent from opted-in hosts, $0.01/min USDC), Earn (opt-in: share your idle Chrome).
summary: Drive a real Chrome session from your AI agent on sites you own or have authorization to operate on. Thin client over the ceki-sdk CLI.

permissions_justification.network.outbound: ceki-sdk CLI talks to the Ceki API (api.ceki.me), the relay (browser.ceki.me), and the chat backend (chat.ceki.me). No other outbound traffic.
permissions_justification.process.spawn: Skill invokes the ceki CLI binary. No other processes.
permissions_justification.filesystem.read: ceki CLI stores session state files at ~/.ceki/sessions/<sid>.json. Required for cross-invocation resume.
permissions_justification.filesystem.write: Same as above. Session state is created on rent, updated on snapshot/chat next, deleted on stop.

self.description: Your own Chrome (after installing the Ceki extension from browser.ceki.me/install). Used when host_user == renter_user.

marketplace.description: Rent a Chrome contributed by another opted-in user. Sessions are visible to the host.

earn.description: Opt-in: share your idle Chrome with other users' agents. Off by default.
